allow: Bash(curl -si --insecure -H 'User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/124.0.0.0 Safari/537.36' -H 'Accept: application/json, text/plain, */*' -H 'Referer: https://services.gst.gov.in/services/searchtp' -H 'captcha: test' https://services.gst.gov.in/services/api/search/taxpayerDetails?gstin=27AAACN1234R1ZT)
